macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum post modest gains as crypto market turns cautiously positive
items.summary: Bitcoin rose 2.00% to about $65,647 and Ethereum gained 2.44% to about $1,718 as the broader crypto market recorded slight gains over the past 24 hours. The market remained cautious, with Bitcoin dominance at 58.6% and DeFi TVL also edging higher.

items.title: Crypto market capitalization adds $80 billion amid risk-on sentiment
items.summary: Market commentary highlighted a broad crypto rebound as the sector added roughly $80 billion in value in 24 hours, with Bitcoin briefly approaching the mid-$66,000 area. The move was tied to improving macro sentiment and expectations around a potential US-Iran agreement.

items.title: Bitcoin nears $66K as US-Iran ceasefire hopes lift risk assets
items.summary: Crypto markets rallied after reports of a preliminary US-Iran deal that could reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with Bitcoin trading around $66,000 and the total crypto market cap up 1.8% to about $2.24 trillion. The report said the rebound followed a period of liquidation pressure and risk-off sentiment.

items.title: Cardano founder addresses BTC treasury dispute as whale-driven token crash hits SIREN
items.summary: One market note said Charles Hoskinson responded to a dispute over 1,096 BTC, stating the funds were used for audit costs in 2016 and 2017. The same update reported that a whale sold 670 million SIREN tokens, triggering a price collapse of more than 90%.

items.title: DeFi sector edges higher, led by Lido and a record TVL spike in VisionBoard Vault
items.summary: The DeFi sector reportedly rose 1.28% to $73.493 billion in total value locked, with Lido up 2.85% to $15.434 billion. The note also flagged VisionBoard Vault as the biggest one-day TVL gainer, with an unusually large percentage increase.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Apple unveils Core AI framework for on-device AI model deployment
items.summary: Apple announced Core AI at WWDC26, a new framework for deploying AI models directly on-device. The release appears aimed at making local inference and model conversion part of the Apple developer ecosystem.

items.title: CBS reports on rapid progress in AI-powered humanoid robots
items.summary: CBS aired a 60 Minutes segment on humanoid robots, highlighting recent progress in AI-powered robotics. The coverage suggests humanoids are becoming a major industry focus alongside broader AI advances.

items.title: Recent AI roundup highlights new translation and robotics developments
items.summary: A widely shared AI roundup highlighted several developments from the past week, including Google’s new AI translation tool, a lifelike humanoid robot for emotional companionship, and robots used in crop protection. The roundup also mentioned an AI model allegedly kept private and then released, though the underlying claims are not independently verified in the provided source.

items.title: Industry discussion intensifies around AI spending and bubble risk
items.summary: A finance-focused discussion argued that AI capital expenditure may be slowing and that competition is increasing across major model providers and lower-cost alternatives. The commentary reflects a broader industry trend: pressure on monetization and concerns about whether current AI spending is sustainable.

items.title: Geoffrey Hinton warning underscores growing AI safety concerns
items.summary: A recent interview clip with Geoffrey Hinton emphasized that AI is advancing faster than expected and may soon contribute to novel mathematics and reasoning. The discussion reflects continuing concern among leading researchers about capability gains and safety risks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
